name: ContractDates
description: Customer wants to know when their contract starts, ends, or how long they have remaining — they are requesting contract date information, not discussing renewal options, reporting contract errors, or requesting a copy of their contract.

sampleUtterances.utterance: When does my contract end?
What is the {contractDateType} of my contract?
How long do I have left on my contract?
Can you tell me the {contractDateType} for my broadband?
I want to check the {contractDateType} on my account
When did my current contract start?

What's my {contractDateType} ?

Is my contract still running?
